introduction: This script adds map layers that can be enabled via the right navigation bar at the very bottom.
readmeLink: For more information, see the full documentation.
swissimageUpdateText: This map shows when the {{layer}} map was updated for each region.
publicTransportStopsNote: Public transport stops appear as orange circular icons on the map. Click on them to create or update venues. Stops already mapped by a venue with the same name within a 75-meter radius are hidden, so only the ones still needing work are shown.

deleteObsoleteStop.message: The venue "{{name}}" has no matching SBB stop. Do you want to delete it?

venueMatchDialog.selectMessage: Multiple matching stops found. Choose which one to merge with:
venueMatchDialog.message:
It seems {{venueCount}} stop(s) with this name already exist.
We have selected them for you.
What would you like to do?
Selecting 
Merge
will apply the information to the existing stops without creating a new one.

streetCheck.toggleEnabledTitle: Master switch: off disables scanning, the map layer and the edit-panel box
streetCheck.toggleAutoScanTitle: Scan automatically when the map moves; off = use the Rescan button
streetCheck.rescanTitle: Clear the cache and fetch the official register again
streetCheck.locateTitle: Center the map on the segment
streetCheck.geoAdminLinkTitle: Open this spot on map.geo.admin.ch (official register layer)
streetCheck.cantonMapLinkTitle: Open this spot on the {{canton}} cantonal map
streetCheck.filterChipTitle: Filter the list by this status
streetCheck.noteOwnDistance: its official axis is ~{{m}} m away
streetCheck.ignoreTitle: Hide this finding (false positive) — stored locally on this device
streetCheck.confirmOverLockFix: This segment is locked above the Swiss minimum (often intentional). Lower the lock to L{{n}}?
streetCheck.confirmGroupFix:
Apply "{{name}}" to {{n}} segments?
Nothing is saved automatically; review and save in WME.
streetCheck.legendCOSMETIC: typography only (case, apostrophe, spacing), dashed line
streetCheck.legendVARIANT: abbreviation, missing accent or article; official spelling suggested
streetCheck.legendNEAR: probable typo; one close official name found
streetCheck.legendWRONG_TYPE: different or missing way type (Chemin ↔ Route, X → Rue X); unique official name suggested
streetCheck.legendBILINGUAL: bilingual street: primary should be one language, the other as an alternate
streetCheck.legendWRONG_STREET: valid name, but the official street underneath has another name
streetCheck.geometryMatching: Geometry matching (official street under the segment)
streetCheck.geometryMatchingTitle: Enables UNNAMED suggestions, wrong-street detection and disambiguation by distance
streetCheck.viewportOnly: Show only segments visible on the map
streetCheck.viewportOnlyTitle: Filters the list and counters to the area currently on screen (no rescan)
streetCheck.editableOnlyTitle: Hide segments locked above my editor rank
streetCheck.legendWRONG_CITY: name exists, but in another locality (city scoping)
streetCheck.legendNOT_FOUND: not found in the official register
streetCheck.legendUNNAMED: checked road type without a name; the official street underneath is suggested when found, dashed line
streetCheck.legendUNNAMED_NO_MATCH: unnamed and no official street found underneath (geometry matching) — usually legitimate
streetCheck.legendMICRO_SEGMENT: drivable segment shorter than 5 m (Swiss guideline; roundabouts excluded)
streetCheck.legendLOOP: loop made of fewer than 3 segments (same endpoints); split it
streetCheck.legendNARROW_MISUSE: Narrow Street misuse: one-way or shorter than 50 m
streetCheck.legendUNDER_LOCK: lock level below the Swiss minimum for its road type (roundabouts: at least L3)
streetCheck.legendOVER_LOCK: lock rank above the Swiss minimum (often intentional)
streetCheck.guidelineChecks: Swiss guideline checks (micro-segments, loops, narrow streets)
streetCheck.guidelineChecksTitle: Checks from the Suisse romande editing guidelines that need no external data
streetCheck.helperSetting: Issue box in the segment edit panel
streetCheck.altOk: Alternate name match counts as OK
streetCheck.altOkTitle: Useful in bilingual communes where the second language is an alternate name
streetCheck.showMapLabels: Show expected name on the map (zoom ≥ 17)
streetCheck.keepOldName: Keep old name as alternate when fixing
streetCheck.scopingTitle: Compare the segment's city with the official locality (zip_label)
streetCheck.shortcutNextIssue: Street names: select the next issue
streetCheck.shortcutFixSelected: Street names: fix the selected segment
streetCheck.errNoCity: Segment has no city; set the city first
streetCheck.errStreetCreate: Could not find or create the street record
streetCheck.errLockAboveRank: Lock L{{expected}} is above your editor level (L{{user}})
streetCheck.tabNote: Compares Waze street names against the official Swiss register and flags mismatches, with one-click fixes. Open the dedicated 🇨🇭 Street names tab to review the issues.
